name: contextify
description: Persistent context engine for Claude Code: your project gets a permanent understanding layer (screenshots → structured markdown at ~95% fewer vision tokens; code → live Software Knowledge Graph with incremental indexing) so Claude queries instead of re-discovering. 13 tools: what-if change simulation, visual Mermaid explanations, impact analysis + regression risk, architecture score with usage heatmap, feature graph, screenshot↔code matching, temporal diffs + timeline. React/Next.js + Flutter. Interactive graph.html + CLI. All local — code never leaves your machine.
